title: EmojiCrafter
description: Easily add custom emojis to your server by placing them into your plugins folder, with a single resource pack that doesn't need to update!
body:
# EmojiCrafter

EmojiCrafter is a Paper plugin that allows you to add any 16px high emoji icon to your server, with shortcuts like :) and :smile:

For support join the [Starshooter](https://discord.gg/dQGaXgxMpg) discord server.

## Server Hosting (Advertisement)
[![Create a server on Bisect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c367e7ba28598bc811ff7d632c22ebed744ff3.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/comet)

## How to use
To create emojis, first place the emoji image in the folder `~/plugins/EmojiCrafter/emojis`, then give them an entry in `~/plugins/EmojiCrafter/emojis.yml`, where you provide the path to the image and shortcuts to replace with the image.

To use emojis players must have the permission `emojicrafter.default`, which everyone has by default - though this can be disabled using permission plugins such as LuckPerms.

The plugin contains a 'smile' emoji as an example by default, though you can remove or change this if you want.

## Donate

[ ![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29887a4bb8c2890b0aecf5433bde4e48068d18fe.png)](https://ko-fi.com/cometcake575)
